series_metadata.series_title: Written agreements reflecting use of ODH data
series_metadata.series_description: Written agreements and addenda that reflect using ODH data often referred to as Data Use Agreements, and applications or requests to use data, and all related documentation such as supplemental submissions and amended agreements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For written agreements; addenda, applications and amendments terminating prior to June 16, 2021, retain 8 years after contract termination, then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved. For written agreements; addenda, applications and amendments terminating after June 16, 2021, retain 6 years after contract termination, then destroy. Provided all contract issues are resolved. ; Electronic: For written agreements; addenda, applications and amendments which terminated prior to June 16, 2021, retain 8 years after contract termination, then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved. For written agreements; addenda, applications and amendments which terminated after June 16, 2021, retain 6 years after contract termination, then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
